title: Learning to Jump Rope 学跳绳
scene: Mia在教Sara学跳绳，从基础开始。

lines.en: Sara, do you know how to jump rope?
Not really. I always trip on the rope.
lines.zh: 不太会。我总是被绳子绊倒。

lines.en: Let me teach you. Hold one handle in each hand.
lines.zh: 我来教你。每只手拿一个把手。

lines.en: OK. What should I do with my feet?
Stand with your feet together. Swing the rope over.
lines.zh: 双脚并拢站立。把绳子甩过去。

lines.en: Like this? Oops, I stepped on it.
lines.zh: 像这样吗？哎呀，我踩到绳子了。

lines.en: That is OK. Try again. Jump when the rope comes.
lines.zh: 没关系。再试一次。绳子过来的时候跳。

lines.en: One... two... three! I did three jumps!
You did it! Now keep going.
This is fun! I want to practice more.
